screens.title: Sign in
screens.body: Sign in with your email address.

screens.title: Network access
screens.body: The app needs network permission to discover rooms and detect devices on the network.

screens.title: Bluetooth
screens.body: Bluetooth is required to pair and communicate with nearby devices.

screens.title: Camera
screens.body: Camera access is used for scanning setup codes. You can continue without it if you enter codes manually.

screens.title: No connection
screens.body: Connect to Wi‑Fi or plug in Ethernet to discover rooms and devices on the network.

screens.title: No Wi‑Fi connection
screens.body: Connect your phone to your wireless network to find and control your speakers.

screens.title: Network rooms
screens.body:
There are rooms on the network you have not added to the app. You can join one or create your own.

Creating your own room requires at least two devices detected on the LAN that are not in any room yet.

screens.title: Room
screens.body: Legacy copy; routing uses room_interior when you open a room.

screens.title: No rooms on the network
screens.body: We couldn’t find any rooms. But we did find {{count}} available {{devices}}:

screens.title: Connect your devices
screens.bodyZeroDevices: Make sure your devices are powered on and connected to the same network as your phone.
screens.body:
6c’s are WiFi-enabled. Scan the QR code on the back of the speaker to connect it to your wireless network.

You can also connect your 6c to your local network with an ethernet cable.

screens.title: {{count}} devices found
screens.bodyZeroDevices: Make sure your devices are powered on and connected to the same network as your phone.
screens.body: Select the ones you want to add to a room.

screens.title: You don't have any rooms.
screens.body: Scan your device's QR code or connect via Ethernet to add them to a room.

screens.title: Default
screens.body: No rule matched this combination. Add or reorder rules in public/config/rules.json.
